title: Seeded corpus (labelled) + metrics harness (recall/FP/consistency/latency/zero-r

summary: T10 landed via PR #25 (merge 3d5c4b4): vg-bench eval harness + Go/No-Go gate; contract v1.4 (benchmark gained ctx). Dispatch died mid-response (failure mode #4), rescued in place. Two doubt rounds: Fable found the |-separator consistency probe fabricating a permanent 66.7% gate failure (email atext); Codex found five vacuous-pass seams in the round-1 fixes. First honest verdict: NO-GO on FP rate 16.7% (entropy 13.3%, phone 40%, un-dilutable benign-slice numerators) + display-collision corruption confirmed 1/3 — T11's inheritance, with data. 221 tests/0 failures; tollgate approved by coderturtle.
